name: belt-lab-tool
title: Belt Lab Tool
author: solarcloud7
description: Lab instrument for the FactorioSurfaceExport belt-restoration experiments: drag-select belts to capture lane contents (the transfer-record shape); alt-select to re-apply with the production per-piece algorithm; reverse-select to apply with the whole-line candidate algorithm; alt-reverse-select to clear lanes. Physical counts only — insert returns are never evidence.
